code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:5000/api'});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('srmart_token');if(token)config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;return config;});export const register=data=>API.post('/register',data);export const login=(email,password)=>API.post('/login',{email,password});export const getProducts=()=>API.get('/products');export const getOrders=()=>API.get('/orders');export const createOrder=data=>API.post('/orders',data);export default API;
